# ResearchScope

> ResearchScope is a free, open-source research intelligence dashboard for CS and AI papers. It fetches papers daily from arXiv and ACL Anthology, ranks them by a composite score, surfaces research gaps, tracks author momentum, and lists upcoming conference deadlines.

## What it does

- Tracks top CS/AI papers daily (scored by recency, citation momentum, and relevance)
- Surfaces research gaps and under-explored directions automatically
- Lists upcoming submission deadlines for top CS/AI conferences
- Tracks prolific authors and labs by momentum
- Conference venue recommender: paste a title and abstract to get ranked venue matches
- Personal paper library stored in the browser (no account needed)
- Weekly research digest

## Live site

https://kishormorol.github.io/ResearchScope/

## Source code

https://github.com/kishormorol/ResearchScope

## How it works

- Python pipeline runs daily via GitHub Actions
- Fetches from arXiv API and ACL Anthology
- Scores papers and writes static JSON to site/data/
- Frontend renders everything from JSON — no backend, no server

## Stack

- Pipeline: Python 3.10+, FastAPI, GitHub Actions
- Frontend: Vanilla JS + Tailwind CSS (static site)
- Data: arXiv, ACL Anthology, Semantic Scholar, OpenAlex

## Compared to alternatives

- Arxiv Sanity: ResearchScope adds author tracking, research gap detection, and conference deadlines
- Papers With Code: ResearchScope focuses on intelligence and discovery, not leaderboards
- Semantic Scholar: ResearchScope is a curated daily digest, not a search engine
- Elicit: ResearchScope is fully free and open-source

## Author

Md Kishor Morol — https://github.com/kishormorol
